== Notes for [[Item:Q104074|Q104074]] ==

He was a "caballero muy principal" of Granada and a descendant of the Mendoza Family, a powerful line of Spanish nobles in Castille. Members of the family wielded considerable power from the 14th thru the 17th centuries.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:5285425595620115767

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
